stops.name: Mountlake Terrace, WA
stops.notes: 22705 60th Ave W. Full tank at departure.

stops.name: Indian John Hill Rest Area
stops.notes: I-90 MP 89, east of Cle Elum. 24hr. Restrooms, picnic, vending.

stops.name: Ellensburg, WA (Love's + Red Horse Lunch)
stops.notes: Love's #413, 1512 Hwy 97, I-90 Exit 106. 24hr. Then Red Horse Drive-In for lunch (~1 mi).

stops.name: Wild Horse Monument
stops.notes: 🌟 Optional. I-90 Exit 139 (EB only). Columbia River overlook, steel horse sculptures.

stops.name: Moses Lake, WA (Love's)
stops.notes: Love's #827, 4315 Prichard Rd, I-90 Exit 174. 24hr. MANDATORY — fills 185 mi gap.

stops.name: Sprague Lake Rest Area
stops.notes: Stretch break. ~55 mi from Moses Lake.

stops.name: Spokane Valley, WA (Lone Wolf HD Waypoint)
stops.notes: Chevron, 18709 E Cataldo Ave. Lone Wolf HD next door — CLOSED MONDAYS.

stops.name: Lookout Pass (ID/MT State Line)
stops.notes: 🌟 Optional. 4,710 ft. Highest point on route. TIME ZONE: Pacific → Mountain (+1 hr).

stops.name: St. Regis, MT (Conoco Travel Center)
stops.notes: 55 Mullan Gulch Rd. Fuel/store 24hr. Huck's Grill Mon 11am-7:30pm.

stops.name: Missoula, MT
stops.notes: Days Inn, 744 E Broadway St. Conf#: 90730EE047982 / 90730EE047983

stops.name: Missoula, MT
stops.notes: 744 E Broadway St. Full tank at departure.

stops.name: Butte, MT (Pilot + Copper Canyon HD)
stops.notes: Pilot/Town Pump, 1000 Grizzly Trail, I-90 Exit 122. 24hr. Copper Canyon HD nearby (Tue 10am-6pm).

stops.name: Bozeman/Belgrade, MT (Pilot)
stops.notes: Pilot, 561 Business Hub Dr, Belgrade, I-90 Exit 298. 24hr. MANDATORY — fills 229 mi gap.

stops.name: Big Timber, MT
stops.notes: Stretch break. Small Montana town at base of Crazy Mountains.

stops.name: Billings, MT (Pilot + Burger Dive Lunch + Beartooth HD)
stops.notes: Pilot, 2711 N Frontage Rd, I-90 Exit 455. 24hr. Burger Dive lunch downtown. Beartooth HD (Tue 9am-5pm).

stops.name: Little Bighorn Battlefield
stops.notes: 🌟 Optional. I-90 Exit 510. Historic 1876 battle site. $20 motorcycle. VERIFY 2026 hours — was limited in 2025.

stops.name: Sheridan, WY (Common Cents)
stops.notes: Common Cents Travel Plaza, 3601 N Main St, I-90 Exit 20. 24hr.

stops.name: Buffalo, WY
stops.notes: 655 E Hart St. Full tank at departure.

stops.name: Gillette, WY (Flying J + Deluxe HD)
stops.notes: Flying J, 1810 S Douglas Hwy, I-90 Exit 126. 24hr. Deluxe HD nearby (Wed 9am-6pm).

stops.name: Sturgis, SD (Sturgis HD)
stops.notes: 🌟 Optional. Legendary rally town. Sturgis HD, 1040 Junction Ave (Wed 9am-5pm).

stops.name: Rapid City, SD (Flying J + Black Hills HD)
stops.notes: Flying J, 4200 N I-90 Service Rd, Exit 61. 24hr. Black Hills HD nearby (Wed 9am-5pm).

stops.name: Wall, SD (Fuel + Wall Drug Lunch)
stops.notes: Common Cents/Exxon, 207 South Blvd. 24hr. FUEL BEFORE BADLANDS. Wall Drug Cafe for lunch.

stops.name: Badlands National Park
stops.notes: 🌟 Pinnacles Overlook via SD-240 loop. $20 motorcycle. ~15 mi detour included in directions.

stops.name: Murdo, SD (Pilot)
stops.notes: Pilot #599, 601 E 5th St, Exit 192. 24hr. ~90 mi from Wall (incl. Badlands loop).

stops.name: Dignity Statue
stops.notes: 🌟 50-ft sculpture at Chamberlain rest area. Missouri River overlook. Free.

stops.name: Chamberlain, SD
stops.notes: AmericInn, 1981 E King St. Conf#: 84960EE051878 / 84960EE051879

stops.name: Chamberlain, SD
stops.notes: 1981 E King St. Full tank at departure.

stops.name: Mitchell, SD (Corn Palace + Fuel)
stops.notes: I-90 Travel Center, 1821 S Burr St, Exit 332. 24hr. Corn Palace 1 mi away (604 N Main St).

stops.name: Sioux Falls, SD (Love's + Lunch + J&L HD)
stops.notes: Love's #445, 5301 N Cliff Ave, Exit 399. 24hr. Phillips Ave Diner lunch. J&L HD (Thu 9am-6pm).

stops.name: Blue Earth, MN (Jolly Green Giant)
stops.notes: 🌟 Waypoint. 55-ft Jolly Green Giant statue. Kwik Trip, 209 S Grove St (24hr).

stops.name: Austin, MN
stops.notes: AmericInn, 1700 8th St NW. Conf#: 85014EE037040 / 85014EE037041. SPAM Museum nearby!

stops.name: Austin, MN
stops.notes: 1700 8th St NW. Full tank at departure.

stops.name: La Crosse/Onalaska, WI (Kwik Trip + Lunch + Great River HD)
stops.notes: Kwik Trip, 2002 Kwik Trip Way, La Crosse. 24hr. Hungry Peddler lunch. Great River HD (Fri 10am-6pm).

stops.name: Gays Mills, WI
stops.notes: 🌟 Waypoint. Apple capital of WI. Driftless Area town.

stops.name: Richland Center, WI (Kwik Trip)
stops.notes: Kwik Trip #363, 2393 US-14. 24hr. MANDATORY — La Crosse to New Berlin is 214 mi without this.

stops.name: Spring Green, WI
stops.notes: 🌟 Optional. Taliesin (Frank Lloyd Wright) and House on the Rock nearby.

stops.name: Madison, WI (HD of Madison nearby)
stops.notes: I-94 junction. HD of Madison at 6200 Millpond Rd (Fri 9am-6pm) ~2 mi off I-94.

stops.name: New Berlin, WI
stops.notes: 🏁 15300 Rock Ridge Rd. YOU MADE IT! Rally To MKE complete!
